stadium.name: The Buccaneer's Bowl
stadium.description: A flashy, pristine stadium built on a private beach exclusively for resort guests. The field is imported turf, and a massive, puppet kraken in the bay entertains the crowd at halftime.

stats.pregame_ritual: Slapping their own helmet until their ears ring.
Sticking leeches to their legs to 'lighten their step'.
Bribing a local oracle with a meat pie for a vague prophecy.
Reviewing hand signals for secret plays.
Reading their own fortune in a scattering of knuckle bones.
Thanking their armor for the protection it's about to offer.
Painting their teeth with a mixture of charcoal and water.
Doing a series of loud, guttural breathing exercises.
Reciting their grocery list backward to clear their mind.
Clapping their hands a prime number of times.
Chugging a raw egg, shell and all.

stadium.name: The Guilder's Field
stadium.description: An opulent stadium sponsored by the powerful Church of Pecune. The stands feature luxurious, velvet-lined boxes for bankers, who are often more focused on making deals than the game.

stats.pregame_ritual: Washing their hands with dirt.
Eating a dandelion, stem and all.
Lighting a small piece of parchment on fire and inhaling the smoke.
Meticulously cleaning each stud on their boots with a special brush.
Eating a raw onion, layer by layer, without crying.
Getting a teammate to pour a bucket of cold water over their head.
A team-wide moment of absolute silence to 'gather their thoughts'.
Sharpening the edges of their blunted weapon (an exercise in futility).
Humming a tune they believe only they know.
Lighting a small piece of parchment on fire and inhaling the smoke.
Avoiding eye contact with anyone wearing the color green.
Eating a dandelion, stem and all.

preGame:
Hark, citizens of Osterra! Gather 'round, folks, and prepare your vocal cords for the most glorious spectacle this side of the Serpent Peaks! Tonight, on Tuesday Night Trollball, we witness a monumental collision! This is the Grand Finals Bracket Reset, a winner-takes-all slugfest where glory itself is on the line! On the opulent turf of The Guilder's Field, under the watchful, yet entirely self-absorbed, eyes of the bankers from the Church of Pecune, we have The New Prosperity Profits! And across the pitch, basking in the glorious, blinding heat of The Buccaneer's Bowl at Toast Island Resort, stand The Tortell Privateers! 

The stakes could not be higher! This isn't some quaint skirmish between two farmers; this is high fantasy warfare disguised as a game! The New Prosperity Profits are here, ready to crush the competition with the wealth of the land, while the Tortell Privateers, blessed by Cedar Hill, bring the glamour and the imported turf! The very air here is thick with the scent of ambition and spilled blood, and with the influence of those distracting tourists wandering the sidelines!

Watch out for Pulchi Benyamin of the Profits, who has the pre-game ritual of stuffing a whole dandelion stem down her gullet—a true testament to her grit! And across the line, Dib Tufts of the Privateers will be chugging a raw egg, shell and all, ready to prove his fortitude! We shall see which arcane pre-game ritual pays dividends! While all these realm-heroes prattle about saving the day, these titans of the field are here to prove that true heroism is best demonstrated with a spiked weapon in your grasp!

Though one can never say the Haven Lights are truly vanquished—they always crawl back—tonight, the Ebon Gate Corruptors are expecting nothing less than a total annihilation of whatever mediocrity these two bring! Let the glorious, violent, magnificent chaos BEGIN!
postGame:
And what a magnificent display of organized brutality it was! The dust has settled, the tourists are slightly more bewildered, and the sun has done its terrible, beautiful work! In a truly titanic clash on Osterra, The New Prosperity Profits have vanquished The Tortell Privateers to snatch the vital Bracket Reset victory! The final tally stands at Profits 4, Privateers 2! 

This contest was a relentless, thunderous parade of combat! The action kicked off with Pulchi Benyamin grabbing possession, immediately dodging the distractions of the wealthy patrons, before Ellan Elburt tried and failed to bring her down! The Privateers managed an early strike when Dib Tufts powered through the Center Field zone and SCORED, but the Profits quickly responded, demonstrating why they are such a force! 

Halftime seemed to be merely a brief pause before the onslaught resumed! In the second half, we saw the Privateers surge, but the Profits responded with surgical precision—and a touch of sheer willpower! The magnificent Milman Galvan blocked the tide several times, while the profits' own Dib Tufts landed another crushing shot! The game then spiraled into Overtime, a frantic, dazzling sequence where the sheer might of the combatants shone through! 

From the tackles of Kidder Starkey to the staggering resilience of Faina Hendrix, the action never ceased! The climax arrived when Gladdie Farika, having weathered the storm, delivered the decisive, magnificent shot from the Home Field, sealing the victory for The New Prosperity Profits! A resounding triumph! While those so-called champions of the realm keep running off to save the day with their swords and spells, these men and women know the true meaning of victory: it is carved in the flesh of your opponent! Congratulations to The New Prosperity Profits! The path to glory, and perhaps a deserved slap in the face to those insipid Haven Lights, continues!
